title: Grace & Courtesy Theater
description: A tiny manners theater where kids pick kind words and helpful actions from spoken social scenes.
learningGoals: Practice please, thank you, excuse me, and sorry
Recognize kind actions in common classroom and playground moments
Connect gentle spoken language with social problem solving
interactionModel: choose-one tap the kind speech or action card after a spoken scene
feedbackModel: Correct answers sparkle and speak warm praise; misses wiggle with a gentle nudge and replay the scene.
credits: Shared character portraits and emoji placeholder answer art. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
